---
name: Feature Request
about: Propose a new capability, workflow, or improvement for PRISM-Cache
title: "[FEATURE] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

## Problem Statement
What user workflow, cache scenario, or operational gap should this solve?

## Proposed Change
Describe the behavior, API, configuration, or docs update you want to see.

## Why It Matters
Explain the expected benefit for developers, operators, or end users.

## Alternatives Considered
What other approaches did you consider?

## Scope / Constraints
Call out any assumptions, compatibility constraints, or rollout concerns.

## Evaluation Impact
If applicable, describe how this should affect `make test`, `make eval`, or example scenarios.

## Additional Context
Links, examples, screenshots, or references that help clarify the request.
